CQ.0: What is the username of the player?
CQ.1: Who are the friends of the player?
CQ.2: Who are the friends that play other games as well with this player?
CQ.3: Who are the most active players in the game?
CQ.4: What are the achievements of my friends?
CQ.5: Who does the player play with?
CQ.6: What type of items are the most traded ones in the game’s marketplace?
CQ.7: Where do the players live who have not made any in­-app purchases?
CQ.8: How many times players have died in a level?
CQ.9: What are the types of achievements in this game?

Term.1: Player, is friend with player, Player
Term.2: Player, is friend with player, Player; Player, plays game, Game
Term.4: Player, is friend with player, Player; Player own achievement, Achievement
Term.5: Player, is event associated to player, Player
Term.6: Game, is an item in game, Item; Item, hasFeature, Feature
Term.7: In-app purchase event, is event associated to player, Player
Term.8: Player, owns character, Character; Character, is event triggered by character, Lose event
Term.9: Game, is achievement in game, Achievement; Achievement, type, string
